name.description: Product name. Do not translate Kode Injector.

description.message: Inject JavaScript and CSS from local files into websites

language_label.description: Label for the interface language selector.

language_browser.description: Use the browser UI language automatically.

source_code.description: Link label for the project source repository.

source_code_title.message: Report an issue or view the source code
source_code_title.description: Tooltip for the project source link.

form_site_placeholder.description: Placeholder for the website hostname matched by an injection rule.

form_site_required.description: Validation message when the site hostname is empty.

form_js_path_required.message: Enter the path to a JavaScript file
form_js_path_required.description: Validation message when the local JavaScript file path is empty.

form_css_path_required.message: Enter the path to a CSS file
form_css_path_required.description: Validation message when the local CSS file path is empty.

form_add_injection.description: Button that creates an injection rule.

table_site.description: Injection table column for the matched website.

table_js_path.description: Injection table column for a local JavaScript file.

table_css_path.description: Injection table column for a local CSS file.

table_empty.description: Empty state shown when no injection rules exist.

injection_disable.description: Tooltip for disabling one injection rule.

injection_enable.description: Tooltip for enabling one injection rule.

injection_remove.description: Tooltip for deleting one injection rule.

injection_remove_confirm.message: This injection will be removed permanently. Are you sure?
injection_remove_confirm.description: Confirmation before permanently deleting an injection rule.

popup_pause_all.description: Tooltip for globally pausing Kode Injector.

popup_enable_all.description: Tooltip for globally enabling Kode Injector.

popup_open_settings.description: Tooltip for opening the options page.

popup_no_injections.description: Popup state when the current site has no enabled injection rules.

popup_disable_site.description: Tooltip for disabling all injection rules on the current site.

popup_enable_site.description: Tooltip for enabling injection rules on the current site.

popup_report_issue_title.description: Tooltip for the issue reporting action.

popup_report_issue.description: Button label for reporting a problem.
